amendment.description: To rescind unobligated balances under the One Big Beautiful Bill Act.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5763 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 155.

action.text: Amendment SA 5763 proposed by Senator Peters to Amendment SA 5453. To rescind unobligated balances under the One Big Beautiful Bill Act.
